title: calochortus ciscoensis
intro: Calochortus ciscoensis, also known as the Cisco Mariposa Lily or Mariposa Lily, is a perennial plant species in the family Iridaceae. It is native to the western United States, particularly in the Rocky Mountains. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Calochortus ciscoensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and have been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats and coughs.
